name: PHP with MySQL
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io && sudo service docker start && docker run -d --name my-mysql -p 3306:3306 -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=your_password -e MYSQL_DATABASE=gradedunit -e MYSQL_USER=user -e MYSQL_PASSWORD=pass mysql:latest && sudo chmod a+x "$(pwd)" && sudo rm -rf /var/www/html && sudo ln -s "$(pwd)" /var/www/html && if [ -f composer.json ]; then composer install; fi
